name: Italian Busta Paga
description: Italian payslip. Detects Codice Fiscale, Partita IVA, Matricola INPS, Italian dates, Italian phone numbers, BIC/SWIFT, plus names, addresses and IBAN. Disables the noisy generic 'Amounts' detector so salary figures in tables aren't over-redacted.

patterns.name: Codice Fiscale
patterns.description: Italian tax code — 16 alphanumeric chars with specific structure

patterns.name: Partita IVA
patterns.description: Italian VAT number — 11 digits, optional 'IT' prefix

patterns.name: Italian date (DD/MM/YYYY or DD-MM-YYYY)
patterns.description: Italian date format — DD/MM/YYYY, DD.MM.YYYY or DD-MM-YYYY

patterns.name: Italian phone number
patterns.description: Italian phone numbers — fixed (0xx) or mobile (3xx), optional +39
